title: Stage 1 — language cleanup + decomposition
description: Output of the LLM funnel's first stage (LLM call #1). Reads a free-text human request and produces a structured decomposition: goal, targets, exclusions, concepts, vague_terms. Does NOT pick files, ids, or specific analyses. See LLM_FUNNEL_SPEC.md §4.

goal.description: One-sentence restatement of intent. 'unknown' if the request is too vague to decompose.

targets.description: What is being looked at — chromosomes, candidates, sample subsets the question is about. Free text; not resolved to ids yet.

exclusions.description: What must be excluded. Free text.

concepts.description: Likely concept tags the request invokes (e.g. 'inheritance testing', 'structural variation'). Hand-off to stage 2.

vague_terms.description: Words that need disambiguation downstream. Stage 4 may surface these as questions.

notes.description: Optional free-text note from the LLM (e.g. 'request appears to mix two research questions; only the first was decomposed').
